Built for SA Grade 11 & 12

The student success platform built for matric.

Aptiverse unifies SBA preparation, mastery tracking, wellbeing, tutoring and bursaries into a single, calm workspace — purpose-built for South African Grade 11 & 12 learners.

Everything connected

A complete success partner — not another study app

From the SBA you wrote yesterday to the bursary deadline next month, Aptiverse joins the dots so you always know what to do next.

SBA-aligned planning

Add your upcoming SBAs once. AI plans the lead-up, sets healthy goals from your history, and keeps you on track.

Learn more
AI practice tests

Drilled to your weakest topics, with rubric-based marking and pattern analysis after every attempt.

Learn more
Predictive mastery

We track strengths over each term so you can prep for next term in advance — never blindsided.

Learn more
Wellbeing first

Mood check-ins, breathing breaks, in-app psychologist. We catch stress early and give you space to breathe.

Learn more
Verified rewards

Free courses, tutor hours, masterclasses, badges. Schools verify with one click — no paperwork for teachers.

Learn more
Always-on AI tutor

A patient explainer, drill-generator and exam coach in your pocket. No question is too small.

Learn more
Tutors & courses

Verified tutors and specialised courses to bridge the gaps. Pay-per-session or subscribe — it's your choice.

Learn more
University & career

Dream-course planner, APS calculator, real-life career stories — and the bursary navigator that helps you fund it.

Learn more
Learning journey map

Visualise progress as a map of mastered landmarks — gamified for growth, never ranking.

Learn more
Built for you

One platform, five views

Every role gets exactly what they need — no clutter, no toxic comparison.

For Students

Plan, practise, reflect, win.

Learn more
For Parents

How can I help dashboards.

Learn more
For Teachers

Class-wide gap analysis.

Learn more
For Schools

Whole-school readiness.

Learn more
For Tutors

Sell courses, run sessions.

Learn more
Bursary partners

Find verified, motivated talent.

Learn more
Designed in SA, for SA

The South African context — handled

Aptiverse is built for the realities of matric in this country.

Data-light & offline

Practice tests download. Diary works offline. Goals you set today sync next time you're online.

Multi-language support

Key explanations and chatbot replies in isiZulu, Afrikaans, isiXhosa — and more rolling out.

Catch-up modules

Optional foundations like 'Algebra for Physics' or 'Grammar for Essays' to bridge real gaps.

NSFAS & bursary navigator

Updated guides, deadline reminders, document checklists. Demystified, in plain language.

IEB & NSC past papers

AI links past paper questions to your specific upcoming SBA — instant, relevant practice.

Mental health, normalised

Stress is part of matric — we frame struggle as growth and connect you to a psychologist when needed.

Start free. Grow at your pace.

The free tier is genuinely useful — goals, diary, basic practice and the wellbeing toolkit. Upgrade only when you're ready.

Create free accountSee pricing
